default.description: Name of the active workspace (key into `workspaces`)

workspaces.description: Map of workspace name → { mode, datastore?, cloud? }

mode.description: Storage strategy: FILESYSTEM | CLOUD | DUAL_FILESYSTEM_PRIMARY | DUAL_CLOUD_PRIMARY

datastore.description: Filesystem datastore path — required for FILESYSTEM and DUAL_* modes

cloud.description: Postgres + S3 connection config { pg, s3, embeddings? } — required for CLOUD and DUAL_* modes

studioPort.description: Port the Studio frontend listens on

apiPort.description: Port the API server listens on

systemItemsDir.description: Path to the system items directory (kanecta-system-items/items)
